issues.description: FlipLife action is mandatory in DSL but card text says 'You may' — should be optional/conditional
SearchDeck is incomplete: missing filter for {Fish-Man Island} type, missing reveal requirement, missing deck ordering mechanic for remaining 2 cards

Action sequence incomplete: card text requires (1) flip 1 life (optional), (2) look at top 3, (3) reveal up to 1 Fish-Man Island, (4) add to hand, (5) place remaining cards at top/bottom in any order — DSL only captures partial logic
